item.title: Two 7-Zip Flaws Allow Code Execution via Malicious ZIP Files (CVE-2025-11001 & CVE-2025-11002)
item.content:encoded: The Zero Day Initiative (ZDI) has published details of two critical vulnerabilities in the popular open-source compression utility 7-Zip, which could allow attackers to execute arbitrary code by trick ... Vulnerabilities has been mentioned in this article.

item.title: Hackers exploiting zero-day in Gladinet file sharing software
item.content:encoded: Threat actors are exploiting a zero-day vulnerability (CVE-2025-11371) in Gladinet CentreStack and Triofox products, which allows a local attacker to access system files without authentication. At lea ... Vulnerabilities has been mentioned in this article.

item.title: Ransomware crims that exploited SharePoint 0-days add Velociraptor to their arsenal
item.content:encoded: The ransomware gang caught exploiting Microsoft SharePoint zero-days over the summer has added a new tool to its arsenal: Velociraptor, an open-source digital forensics and incident response app not p ... Vulnerabilities has been mentioned in this article.

item.title: Auth Bypass Flaw in Service Finder WordPress Plugin Under Active Exploit
item.content:encoded: Website owners using the Service Finder WordPress theme and its bundled Bookings plugin must update their software immediately, as a serious security flaw is currently being targeted by cybercriminals ... Vulnerabilities has been mentioned in this article.

item.title: Zero-day in file-sharing software leads to RCE, and attacks are ongoing
item.content:encoded: Zero-day in file-sharing software leads to RCE, and attacks are ongoing Security research firm Huntress is warning all users of Gladinet's CentreStack and Triofox file-sharing tools to urgently apply an available mitigation, as a zero-day is being actively exploited and t ... Vulnerabilities has been mentioned in this article.

item.title: Threat Actors Exploiting SonicWall SSL VPN Devices in Wild to Deploy Akira Ransomware
item.content:encoded: Threat actors have reemerged in mid-2025 leveraging previously disclosed vulnerabilities in SonicWall SSL VPN appliances to deploy Akira ransomware on enterprise networks. Beginning in July, multiple ... Vulnerabilities has been mentioned in this article.

item.title: From Detection to Patch: Fortra Reveals Full Timeline of CVE-2025-10035 Exploitation

item.title: Attackers are exploiting Gladinet CentreStack, Triofox vulnerability with no patch (CVE-2025-11371)
item.content:encoded: CVE-2025-11371, a unauthenticated Local File Inclusion vulnerability in Gladinet CentreStack and Triofox file-sharing and remote access platforms, is being exploited by attackers in the wild. While Gl ... Vulnerabilities has been mentioned in this article.

item.title: From LFI to RCE: Active Exploitation Detected in Gladinet and TrioFox Vulnerability

Vulnerabilities has been mentioned in this article.

item.title: Gladinet CentreStack And Triofox 0-Day RCE Vulnerability Actively Exploited In Attacks
item.content:encoded: An active in-the-wild exploitation of a zero-day vulnerability in Gladinet CentreStack and Triofox products. Tracked as CVE-2025-11371, the unauthenticated Local File Inclusion (LFI) flaw allows attac ... Vulnerabilities has been mentioned in this article.

item.title: Google Warns of CL0P Ransomware Group Actively Exploiting Oracle E-Business Suite Zero-Day
item.content:encoded: Google Warns of CL0P Ransomware Group Actively Exploiting Oracle E-Business Suite Zero-Day The cybersecurity landscape faces a new and significant threat as the notorious CL0P ransomware group has launched a large-scale extortion campaign targeting Oracle E-Business Suite (EBS) environments ... Vulnerabilities has been mentioned in this article.

item.content:encoded: October 10, 2025The U.S. Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) has included Grafana CVE-2021-43798 in its Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (KEV) catalog in October 2025, signalling to ... Vulnerabilities has been mentioned in this article.

item.title: RondoDox botnet fires 'exploit shotgun' at nearly every router and internet-connected home device
item.content:encoded: A new RondoDox botnet campaign uses an "exploit shotgun" - fire at everything, see what hits - to target 56 vulnerabilities across at least 30 different vendors' routers, DVRs, CCTV systems, web serve ... Vulnerabilities has been mentioned in this article.

item.title: Hackers Actively Exploiting WordPress Plugin Vulnerability to Gain Admin Access
item.content:encoded: Over the past two months, threat actors have weaponized a critical authentication bypass flaw in the Service Finder Bookings WordPress plugin, enabling them to hijack any account on compromised sites. ... Vulnerabilities has been mentioned in this article.

item.title: Oracle E-Business Suite Zero-Day Exploited in Widespread Extortion Campaign
item.content:encoded: Written by: Peter Ukhanov, Genevieve Stark, Zander Work, Ashley Pearson, Josh Murchie, Austin Larsen Introduction Beginning Sept. 29, 2025, Google Threat Intelligence Group (GTIG) and Mandiant began t ... Vulnerabilities has been mentioned in this article.

item.title: Hackers Exploit DFIR Tool ‘Velociraptor’ in Ransomware Attacks
item.content:encoded: Security researchers at Cisco Talos have confirmed that ransomware operators are actively exploiting Velociraptor, an open-source digital forensics and incident response (DFIR) tool, in their attacks. ... Vulnerabilities has been mentioned in this article.

item.content:encoded: October 9, 2025GitLab, a leading DevOps platform, recently patched a critical Denial of Service (DoS) vulnerability discovered in October 2025. This security flaw, tracked as CVE-2025-10004, exposes G ... Vulnerabilities has been mentioned in this article.

item.title: Linux Kernel ksmbd Filesystem Vulnerability Exploited – PoC Released
item.content:encoded: Security researchers have released a full proof-of-concept (PoC) exploit for a high-severity vulnerability in the Linux kernel’s ksmbd module, demonstrating a reliable path to local privilege escalati ... Vulnerabilities has been mentioned in this article.

item.title: CISA Warns of Actively Exploited Zero-Day XSS Flaw in Zimbra Collaboration Suite
item.content:encoded: The U.S. Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) have issued an urgent alert concerning an actively exploited zero-day vulnerability in the Zimbra Collaboration Suite (ZCS). The flaw, ... Vulnerabilities has been mentioned in this article.

item.title: Critical Exploit Lets Hackers Bypass Authentication in WordPress Service Finder Theme
item.author: The Hacker News
item.content:encoded: Threat actors are actively exploiting a critical security flaw impacting the Service Finder WordPress theme that makes it possible to gain unauthorized access to any account, including administrators, and take control of susceptible sites. The authentication bypass vulnerability, tracked as CVE-2025-5947 (CVSS score: 9.8), affects the Service Finder Bookings, a WordPress plugin bundled with the

item.title: CVE-2025-59397 - Open Web Analytics SQL Injection
